title: rubus laciniatus
intro: Rubus laciniatus, also known as the cut-leaved or cut-leaf raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Europe and western Asia. It is a thorny shrub with deeply cut leaves and produces small, edible fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. Rubus laciniatus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and has been traditionally used to promote digestive health and reduce stress.
